TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_Abdullah_II_of_Jordan, title = Abdullah_II_of_Jordan, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/Abdullah_II_of_Jordan} }

S.FORM: I 1962 a miheca saka 1 folad saka 30 a romi'ad masofoc ci Abdullah II of Jordan , malamikomoday a tamdaw. O Sawara'an no kitakit no Jordan anini i ci Abdullah II of Jordan, patirengan a romi'ad i 1999 a miheca saka 2 folad saka 7 a romi'ad.
S.PHON: i **** a miƒß…ô ¶a saka * fo~u…æa…¨~…Æ saka ** a ro~umi °a…¨~…Æ maso~ufo~u ¶ ¶i ab~b~v…¨~…Æo~u~u…æ…æaƒß ii o~uf *o~ur…¨~…Æan , ma…æamiko~umo~u…¨~…Æaj a tam…¨~…Æaw. o~u sawara °an no~u kitakit no~u *o~ur…¨~…Æan anini i ¶i ab~b~v…¨~…Æo~u~u…æ…æaƒß ii o~uf *o~ur…¨~…Æan, patir…ô≈ãan a ro~umi °a…¨~…Æ i **** a miƒß…ô ¶a saka * fo~u…æa…¨~…Æ saka * a ro~umi °a…¨~…Æ.
S.FORM: I 1962 a miheca saka 1 folad saka 30 a romi'ad masofoc ci Abdullah II of Jordan , malamikomoday a tamdaw. O Sawara'an no kitakit no Jordan anini i ci Abdullah II of Jordan, patirengan a romi'ad i 1999 a miheca saka 2 folad saka 7 a romi'ad.
S.PHON: i **** a miƒß…ô ¶a saka * fo~u…æa…¨~…Æ saka ** a ro~umi °a…¨~…Æ maso~ufo~u ¶ ¶i ab~b~v…¨~…Æo~u~u…æ…æaƒß ii o~uf *o~ur…¨~…Æan , ma…æamiko~umo~u…¨~…Æaj a tam…¨~…Æaw. o~u sawara °an no~u kitakit no~u *o~ur…¨~…Æan anini i ¶i ab~b~v…¨~…Æo~u~u…æ…æaƒß ii o~uf *o~ur…¨~…Æan, patir…ô≈ãan a ro~umi °a…¨~…Æ i **** a miƒß…ô ¶a saka * fo~u…æa…¨~…Æ saka * a ro~umi °a…¨~…Æ.
